Bash(cat /home/edith/.claude/projects/-home-edith-drop-my-ai-projects-percona-stack-galaxy/f420615d-77ad-47c5-b873-f5c37ea59d0f/tool-results/b7dtwwq52.txt | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = sys.stdin.read\(\)
repos = json.loads\(data\)
for r in repos:
    if r is None: continue
    print\(r['name'], '| stars:', r.get\('stargazers_count',0\), '| forks:', r.get\('forks_count',0\), '| open_issues:', r.get\('open_issues_count',0\), '| pushed:', r.get\('pushed_at',''\), '| desc:', str\(r.get\('description',''\)\)[:60]\)
" 2>&1 | sort -t: -k2 -rn | head -20)
